current_life_events: It's been three months since the accident, and the startup's funding round is looming; he's been putting in 18-hour days to meet investor demands.
mental_state: Struggling to keep his grief and anxiety at bay while maintaining a composed exterior for his team.
why_bringing_these_up_now: The pressure of the funding round and his solo management of the startup have exacerbated his existing anxiety, health concerns, and sleep problems, while also forcing him to confront the life transition and perfectionism that have been simmering since his co-founder's passing.
